case.title: BOSTON FIVE CENTS SAVINGS BANK v. CITY OF NEW BEDFORD

opinion.h4: BOSTON FIVE CENTS SAVINGS BANK v. CITY OF NEW BEDFORD, (1958)
BOSTON FIVE CENTS SAVINGS BANK ET AL. v. CITY OF NEW BEDFORD. APPEAL FROM THE SUPERIOR COURT OF MASSACHUSETTS, BRISTOL COUNTY. No. 273. Decided October 20, 1958.
opinion.p: Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
Robert G. Dodge and Harold S. Davis for appellants.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
opinion.h4: GRAHAM-WHITE SALES CORP. v. PRIME MANUFACTURING CO., (1958)
opinion.p: GRAHAM-WHITE SALES CORP. ET AL. v. PRIME MANUFACTURING CO. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF WISCONSIN. No. 297. Decided October 20, 1958.
Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
John W. Michael and Herman E. Friedrich for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
